Contact

Get in Touch

We’d love to hear from you. Whether you need support, have a question, or want to get involved, we’re here to help.

Send Us a Message

Fill in the form below and we’ll be in touch.

Your information is confidential. We will only use it to respond to your message.

Other Ways to Reach Us

However you’d like to get in touch, we’re here.

Phone

01234 567890

Email

hello@skrc.org.uk

Office Hours

Monday - Friday, 9am - 5pm

Location

Rural Scotland

Your information is confidential

In a small community, privacy matters — and we take yours seriously. All enquiries are handled with discretion and care.

St Katharine Rural Connect

Support, connection, and care for rural communities
